headline: As Anthropic Nears $1 Trillion Valuation, Tech Veterans Warn Against Repeating Intel’s Biggest Mistake
summary: A panel discussion on episode 1,089 of This Week in Tech (TWiT) debated sky-high AI valuations and capital allocation, with host Leo Laporte and guests Ian Thompson, Owen Thomas, and Doc Rock. They argued that today’s AI leaders face the same capital-allocation challenge that confronted earlier technology giants. Their warning centered on Intel (NASDAQ:INTC), which ... headline: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About AT&T (T): Should You Buy?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), AT&T (T) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: AT&T (T) Just Took The Top Spot In Home Internet Performance
summary: AT&T Fiber was named the top home internet provider in a recent Opensignal report. The report highlighted AT&T Fiber’s performance in speed, reliability, and video quality. This recognition adds a new data point to AT&T’s ongoing multi-year fiber buildout story. For investors watching NYSE:T, this operational update offers a contrast to recent share price pressure. AT&T closed at $22.01, with the stock down 5.5% over the past week and down 12.9% over the past month. Over a 1 year period,...

headline: Tutor Perini Announces Proposed Offering of $400 Million of Senior Notes Due 2033
summary: LOS ANGELES, June 22, 2026--Tutor Perini Corporation (NYSE: TPC) (the "Company"), a leading civil, building and specialty construction company, announced today that it is offering $400 million aggregate principal amount of senior notes due 2033 (the "Notes") in a private offering. The Notes will be senior unsecured obligations of the Company and will be guaranteed by each of its wholly owned domestic subsidiaries that guarantee its revolving credit facility.

The Notes will be senior unsecured obligations of the Company and will be guaranteed by each of its wholly owned domestic subsidiaries that guarantee its revolving credit facility.
